subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down verses as He willeth! Verily He is the Omnipotent, the Mighty, the All-Wise. Naught escapeth His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات کیف اراد انه لهو المقتدر العزیز الحکیم لا یعزب عن علمه من شی ء
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment
